text: 9) Earth and Space – Multiple Choice A waning gibbous moon describes which of the following parts of the lunar cycle? W) Third quarter moon to new moon X) Full moon to third quarter moon Y) First quarter moon to full moon Z) New moon to first quarter moon

text: ANSWER: X) FULL MOON TO THIRD QUARTER MOON
label: TOSSUP_ANSWER

text: 18) Energy – Multiple Choice Research from the Pacific Northwest National Lab indicates that plant mortality in the moist tropics can be largely attributed to what two factors? text: ANSWER: X) CARBON STARVATION AND HYDRAULIC FAILURE
